---
title: "\'Extracts from the journal of a refugee in Georgia\'"
---

## \'Extracts from the journal of a refugee in Georgia\'
**Date:** (August 1866-May 1867)
**Imprint:** <i>MP</i>

### Notes

This was by the author of the earlier \'Home-life in a Confederate State\'.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
